name: property managers handling 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 properties, inaccurate pricing causes lost rental income. We provide real-time vacancy monitoring and pricing recommendations instead of manual market research and guesswork.
problem_solved: Inability to adjust pricing based on real-time vacancy data.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to adjust pricing based on real-time vacancy data.
